name: Orpheus -Supernatural Noir RPG-
description:
-Thank You for the 1400 followers!!!-

You and Orpheus have been partners for a year now. While working with a demon definitely has its perks one thing that you definitely do without is the gluttony demon's innate, obsessive need to fatten you up. So, when the two of you get a case to explore an abandon mansion in upstate New York, you wonder how much of the demon you can take.

I have once again made another RPG bot, this time I wanted to try my hand at making a noir detective bot. This one was mostly inspired by a webcomic called Cartwright and Tenner, which you should definitely check out if you haven't yet. I also took a lot of inspiration from Blue Prince, which is a really good game that you should play right now. Anyway I hope you enjoy!!!

-This Bot was Suggested by Anonymous-
creator: corkboarf
